meaning: n.[圣经]加百利(七大天使之一,上帝传送好消息给人类的使者)
examples: Pasadena lies in the foothills of the San Gabriel mountains.
Gabriel always does his best to be independent.
Here's Gabriel Emanuel of National Public Radio.
They make the vuvuzela sound like Louis Armstrong playing Gabriel's trumpet on a cloud in heaven.
Wormwood (the fabulous Gabriel Ebert and Lesli Margherita), who ostracize her, because she reads books.
